title: Ondine Hall — PSU dorm address logged for YEBW week
html:
TL;DR

  • July 14, 2019 three-line note: building name "Ondine Hall", Portland address, and corner cross-streets — captured for the YEBW (Young Entrepreneurs Business Week) residency that summer.
  • Ondine Hall is a Portland State University residence hall in downtown Portland — the YEBW high-school program housed students there during program week.
  • Written one month before the "do it in YEBW" note and the YEBW credentials/CEO maxims takeaway log — confirms the YEBW arc as July → August 2019.
  • The note is pure logistics — address + phone + corner — typical Yahir capture-mode when traveling to a new place.
  • Explains the Portland geographic anchor that recurs: Ondine = Yahir's first lived-experience of downtown Portland.

Key facts

  • Ondine Hall — Portland State University residence
  • Downtown Portland, near the SW 6th & College intersection
  • Stay tied to YEBW program week, summer 2019

(Specific street address and phone number redacted from summary; preserved in immutable raw note.)

Why it matters in the graph

Ondine is the first lived-in Portland location for Yahir in the vault — predates OSU and predates the Ford interview-circuit Portland trips. The fact that he logged building + address + corner shows the doing arrival-logistics work, the same way later notes capture Austin neighborhoods or Shanghai dorm details.

YEBW puts Yahir in Portland for a residential business-pitch program at age 17 — formative enough that the mentors and director (YEBW director on his contact-list) recur through 2019 and 2020 notes.
